title: Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender lamb and rich flavors. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the beef broth, whisking constantly, then add the red wine and tomato paste.
Return the lamb to the pot, cover and bring to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with thyme and serve hot.
